'''âk-y-dh''' ('''kakayadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xfer|xfer]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-y-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xfer|xfer]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-y-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kakayadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikayadh|thikayadh]] || [[word:jikayadh|jikayadh]] || [[word:shikayadh|shikayadh]] || [[word:kikayadh|kikayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukayadh|thuthukayadh]] || [[word:jujukayadh|jujukayadh]] || [[word:shushukayadh|shushukayadh]] || [[word:kukukayadh|kukukayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukayadh|thukayadh]] || [[word:jukayadh|jukayadh]] || [[word:shukayadh|shukayadh]] || [[word:kukayadh|kukayadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukayadh|thukayadh]] || [[word:jukayadh|jukayadh]] || [[word:shukayadh|shukayadh]] || [[word:kukayadh|kukayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekayadh|thekayadh]] || [[word:jekayadh|jekayadh]] || [[word:shekayadh|shekayadh]] || [[word:kekayadh|kekayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokayadh|thothokayadh]] || [[word:jojokayadh|jojokayadh]] || [[word:shoshokayadh|shoshokayadh]] || [[word:kokokayadh|kokokayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokayadh|thokayadh]] || [[word:jokayadh|jokayadh]] || [[word:shokayadh|shokayadh]] || [[word:kokayadh|kokayadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokayadh|thokayadh]] || [[word:jokayadh|jokayadh]] || [[word:shokayadh|shokayadh]] || [[word:kokayadh|kokayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkayadh|thĂŠkayadh]] || [[word:jĂŠkayadh|jĂŠkayadh]] || [[word:shĂŠkayadh|shĂŠkayadh]] || [[word:kĂŠkayadh|kĂŠkayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakayadh|thathakayadh]] || [[word:jajakayadh|jajakayadh]] || [[word:shashakayadh|shashakayadh]] || [[word:kakakayadh|kakakayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakayadh|thakayadh]] || [[word:jakayadh|jakayadh]] || [[word:shakayadh|shakayadh]] || [[word:kakayadh|kakayadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakayadh|thakayadh]] || [[word:jakayadh|jakayadh]] || [[word:shakayadh|shakayadh]] || [[word:kakayadh|kakayadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakayadh|shakayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakayadh|goshakayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakayadh|gokishakayadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakayadhnĂŒ|shakayadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakayadhnknĂŒ|goshakayadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayadhnĂŒ|gokishakayadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakayadhshĂ«|shakayadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkshĂ«|goshakayadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakayadhshĂ«|gokishakayadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayadhro|shakayadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkro|goshakayadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayadhro|gokishakayadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayadhmu|shakayadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkmu|goshakayadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayadhmu|gokishakayadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakayadhsher|shakayadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakayadhnksher|goshakayadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakayadhsher|gokishakayadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakayadhng|shakayadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkng|goshakayadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakayadhng|gokishakayadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakayadhya|shakayadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkya|goshakayadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakayadhya|gokishakayadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakayadhyam|shakayadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkyam|goshakayadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakayadhyam|gokishakayadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayadhnĂŒshĂ«|shakayadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshakayadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishakayadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayadhnĂŒro|shakayadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayadhnknĂŒro|goshakayadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayadhnĂŒro|gokishakayadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayadhnĂŒmu|shakayadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayadhnknĂŒmu|goshakayadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayadhnĂŒmu|gokishakayadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shakayadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakayadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakayadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayadhshĂ«ro|shakayadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkshĂ«ro|goshakayadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayadhshĂ«ro|gokishakayadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayadhshĂ«mu|shakayadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkshĂ«mu|goshakayadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayadhshĂ«mu|gokishakayadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayadhronĂŒ|shakayadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkronĂŒ|goshakayadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayadhronĂŒ|gokishakayadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayadhroshĂ«|shakayadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkroshĂ«|goshakayadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayadhroshĂ«|gokishakayadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakayadhromu|shakayadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkromu|goshakayadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakayadhromu|gokishakayadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakayadhmunĂŒ|shakayadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkmunĂŒ|goshakayadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakayadhmunĂŒ|gokishakayadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakayadhmushĂ«|shakayadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkmushĂ«|goshakayadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakayadhmushĂ«|gokishakayadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakayadhmuro|shakayadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakayadhnkmuro|goshakayadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakayadhmuro|gokishakayadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
